creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #2)
> > fetch: https://ftp.nasqueron.org/pub/software/salt-wrapper/salt-wrapper-0.0.2.tar.gz: Authentication error
> 
> It looks like the https certificate is outdated.

It works now, but the build fails:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: '/usr/bin/env python3' is an invalid shebang you need USES=shebangfix for 'bin/salt-get-config-dir'

This no longer appears to be relevant, given no response for ~1 year
after comment #2.  I think we can close.
